decisions.title: Search — Material Design 3
decisions.reason: The search application shell has no main document and is intentionally retained as a non-document utility failure.
The direct XML revisit was blocked by the in-app client, and the existing exact extraction found no main or page content; the sitemap is intentionally retained as a machine-readable utility failure.
